remarks: Bright, Sunny & Pristine Second-Floor Rental in the Heart of New Canaan. Enjoy the sun-filled second-floor apartment featuring generous-sized rooms and an abundance of natural light throughout. The entire unit has been freshly painted and updated with new blinds and two brand-new window air conditioning units.  A standout feature is the sunny, open porch overlooking New Canaan's charming Restaurant Row and vibrant village, offering the perfect spot to relax with your morning coffee or unwind at the end of the day. The property also includes access to a private, landscaped rear lawn. One small dog will be considered; no cats, please. Applicants with strong credit are preferred.
